sourceMovie.title: Sorry to Bother You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Sorry to Bother You (2018) as a fantasy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The fantasy and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Mask
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sorry to Bother You clicked for you, The Mask (1994) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sorry to Bother You?
faq.answer: Try The Mask, Idiocracy, Big Trouble in Little China—each shares DNA with Sorry to Bother You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sorry to Bother You?
faq.answer: Sorry to Bother You (2018) is best described as Fantasy, Science Fiction, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sorry to Bother You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this fantasy lane.
